description_long: This object is a classic Nokia mobile phone, featuring a robust, slightly curved plastic body with a dark blue and gray color scheme. The front face displays a monochrome LCD screen with a green backlight, showing a simple menu interface and basic icons, along with a prominent Nokia logo above the display. Below the screen is a physical keypad with white, oval-shaped buttons arranged in a grid, including navigation and function keys. The back of the phone is smooth and features another Nokia logo, with a removable battery cover and a small latch at the bottom. The sides are plain and rounded, contributing to the phone's ergonomic grip. The overall design is utilitarian, compact, and instantly recognizable as an early 2000s mobile device.
description: A classic Nokia mobile phone with a dark blue and gray plastic body, monochrome LCD screen, and white oval keypad buttons. The design is compact, robust, and features prominent Nokia branding.
description_view_0: Front view showing the monochrome LCD screen, Nokia logo, and full white keypad with navigation and function buttons.
description_view_1: Side profile revealing the phone's slim, curved body with no visible buttons or features.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a smooth, dark blue back with a centered Nokia logo and a small latch at the bottom.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile, mirroring the other side with a plain, curved surface and no visible features.
attribute_brand_logo: Nokia logo is present above the screen on the front and centered on the back, both in white text.
attribute_screen_display_content: The screen displays a green monochrome interface with a clock, menu text, and simple icons such as a musical note and signal bars.
attribute_camera_placement: No visible camera modules or lenses are present on any side of the object.
attribute_button_layout: Physical keypad with 12 oval-shaped number and function buttons below the screen, along with two navigation buttons and a central selection button.
